behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md lists all file paths tested; tests check structural properties (existence, braces, DEPS.list sections) derivable from the instruction.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the problem (unreliable polling, rename -b to -s) without specifying exact code changes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_modified_files_deps_updated asserts daemon.ts must have DEPS entries, and test_mcp_deps_structure requires strict mode for cli.ts/program.ts/socketConnection.ts — these are gold-specific internal structural details an alternative correct fix might not produce identically.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Visible tests only read files and check existence/braces/markdown headings/DEPS.list structure; no subprocess execution or behavioral verification of daemon startup or -s flag.

test_not_tautological.reason: All visible f2p tests (test_syntax_check, test_all_modified_files_exist, test_typescript_syntax_valid, test_documentation_files_valid, etc.) pass on the base commit without any fix — they only verify files exist with balanced braces and markdown headings.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Instruction requires renaming -b to -s, stdout markers for daemon readiness, and improved browser error messages, but visible tests don't check for '-s' flag, stdout markers, or the specific error message content.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comments (Gates pass_to_pass) and have descriptive names and docstrings.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and paths appear consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names affected modules/files at a reasonable granularity without pointing to specific lines.
